creator: itechbear@gmail.com
text:
The "playflash.sh" script brought by xombrero source code is actually a
"plugin" for xombrero. It is supposed to be manually copied into
~/.xombrero/ directory by users (alternatively, users can modify the
corresponding option in ~/.xombrero.conf file). It simply invokes
www/get_flash_videos to run multimedia/mplayer to play flash videos
embedded in web pages. I can't find any suitable place , So I put it in
share/${PORTNAME}. Maybe in the future I should  make it as an option and
let users decide whether to install it.

As for the file xombrero.desktop, I took that line from xxxterm. I checked
several ports, like geany, ddd, etc, they also install the .desktop into
/usr/local/share/applications/ directory. So I don't think there's anything
wrong.

HU Dong
